title: Schwarzschild Geodesic Black Hole
description: A full-screen WebGL black hole renderer with RK2 null-geodesic integration, interpolated equatorial disk crossings, relativistic disk emission, lensed procedural deep field, and HDR bloom composition.
techniques: adaptive step size with horizon capture and escape termination
Keplerian shear, Doppler beaming, gravitational redshift, and blackbody disk color
procedural deep-field background sampled by escaped ray direction
half-float HDR target with brightpass, separable blur, ACES composite, aberration, vignette, and grain
